creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251166
Patch for libsidplayfp

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 14.0-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in Poudriere (13.2-RELEASE (amd64)):
audio/sidplayfp
multimedia/audacious-plugins
multimedia/qmmp-qt5
multimedia/qmmp-qt6
